name: chart-tooltip-label-formatter
visual_summary: A chart tooltip label formatter is a flexible text formatting component used to customize the appearance and content of chart tooltips. It is typically used in data visualization contexts, such as when developing interactive charts, to provide more detailed information to users. When choosing this component, consider situations where custom tooltip labels are necessary to enhance user understanding.
generation_prompt:

Style: e.g., dark, minimal, modern
